drop.name: TESTAMENT
drop.tagline: Five pieces. One story. Limited numbers.

products.name: REFINED
products.shortLine: Through the fire. Out as gold.
description: The only colour in the drop — because fire is the only thing that earns it.
Molten gold pouring from the crucible, flames cut somewhere between woodblock and wall. Full back print, flame mark on chest. Gold, orange and bone on heavyweight black.
Pressure isn't the enemy. It's the process.
details: The smallest run of the five. Move accordingly.
products.closingLine: Through the fire. Out as gold.

products.name: VALLEY
description: Though I walk through the valley. Not around it. Through it.
Gothic blackletter arched over a single beam of light breaking the dark. Full front print on heavyweight black cotton. For the days you're in it — and the days you're out the other side.
details: Limited to this run. No restock.

products.name: ARMOUR
description: A breastplate, drawn like a blueprint. Exploded view. Every component labelled: TRUTH. RIGHTEOUSNESS. FAITH. SALVATION.
Because armour was never decoration. It's specification.
Large schematic back print, crosshair mark on front chest. White line on heavyweight black.
details: Limited to this run. No restock.

products.name: JUDAH
description: The lion doesn't announce itself. Half the face holds. Half fragments into shards — because victory costs, and it shows.
Brutalist linework, large back print, small mark on front left chest. Bone print on washed black.
details: Limited to this run. No restock.

products.name: ALPHA/OMEGA
description: The quiet one. Two Greek letters, oversized, offset like a double exposure. Tonal grey on black — you see it when the light catches. Down the spine, in small type: THE BEGINNING AND THE END.
For the ones who don't need it loud.
details: Limited to this run. No restock.
